title: Research networks
summary: ECB listing page cataloging internal research networks covering capital markets, monetary policy transmission, competitiveness, household finance, inflation persistence, and related macro-prudential topics.
key_points: ECB coordinates multiple research networks including Capital Markets and Financial Integration, Competitiveness (CompNet), Household Finance (HFCN), and Inflation Persistence
Additional networks address monetary policy transmission challenges, currency analysis, wage dynamics, and international spill-overs
Research networks span critical policy areas: macro-prudential stability, price-setting microdata, and economic linkages
why_it_matters: Provides structural overview of ECB's research infrastructure for policy analysis
macro_context: ECB maintains coordinated research networks to support monetary policy decisions and financial stability analysis

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page cataloging research network names, not a substantive research document
No publication date available - source metadata shows empty published_at
No substantive research content or findings present - only lists network titles
